The **2001–02 season** was the 98th season in the history of [Hull City Association Football Club](/wiki/Hull_City_A.F.C. "Hull City A.F.C.") and their sixth consecutive season in the [Third Division](/wiki/Football_League_Third_Division "Football League Third Division"). In addition to the [domestic league](/wiki/2001%E2%80%9302_Football_League "2001–02 Football League"), the club would also participate in the [FA Cup](/wiki/2001%E2%80%9302_FA_Cup "2001–02 FA Cup"), the [League Cup](/wiki/2001%E2%80%9302_Football_League_Cup "2001–02 Football League Cup"), and the [League Trophy](/wiki/2001%E2%80%9302_Football_League_Trophy "2001–02 Football League Trophy").
